title: Rose's New Shades
description: A simple shader for silly block game
body:
Hiiiiiiiii it's me again this time I learned glsl

This pack of shaders was created because all the high performance shaders I found changed too much for my tastes and all the vanilla adjacent ones performed really poorly

Because like, who needs realistic lighting in block game?

I aim to keep this above 60fps (or 40 minimum) on my stinky integrated graphics so it should be fine on whatever you might have

Enjoy :D
